# CIE high-charge-pool tables for O (Z=8, pool q = 3 .. 8)
# Source: ioneq_O.txt + cool_O.txt
# x_high_frac  = sum_{q >= 3} ioneq_q(T)
# q_high_mean  = sum_{q >= 3} q * ioneq_q / x_high_frac  (0 where pool is empty)
# Lambda_high  = sum_{q >= 3} ioneq_q * L_q     [erg cm^3 / s]
# T grid: 121 log-spaced points, 10^3.00 K -> 10^9.00 K
